989.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ammar ibn Yasir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Whoever fasts the day about which there is doubt has disobeyed Abu al-Qasim ﷺ.'
989.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ammar ibn Yasir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Barangsiapa berpuasa pada hari yang diragukan, maka ia telah mendurhakai Abu al-Qasim ﷺ.'

990.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Fast upon sighting it (the crescent), and break your fast upon sighting it. If clouds obscure it from you, then complete the count as thirty, and do not begin the month by anticipation.'
990.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berpuasalah ketika melihatnya (hilal), dan berbukalah ketika melihatnya. Jika awan menghalangi kalian darinya, sempurnakanlah hitungan menjadi tiga puluh, dan janganlah kalian mendahului bulan.'

991.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ mentioned Ramadan and said: 'Do not fast until you see the crescent, and do not break your fast until you see it. If it is obscured from you, then calculate it.'
991.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyebutkan Ramadan dan bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian berpuasa hingga melihat hilal, dan janganlah berbuka hingga melihatnya. Jika terhalang dari kalian, maka hitunglah.'

992.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Fast upon sighting it, and break your fast upon sighting it. If the month is obscured from you, then count thirty.'
992.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berpuasalah ketika melihatnya, dan berbukalah ketika melihatnya. Jika bulan terhalang dari kalian, maka hitunglah tiga puluh.'

993.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that he expressed wonder at those who begin fasting before the month, saying that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When you see it, fast; and when you see it, break your fast. If it is obscured from you, then complete the count as thirty days.'
993.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia merasa heran terhadap orang yang mendahului bulan, dan ia berkata bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kalian melihatnya, berpuasalah; dan apabila kalian melihatnya, berbukalah. Jika terhalang dari kalian, sempurnakanlah hitungan tiga puluh hari.'

994.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them both) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw the new crescent, he would say: 'Allahu Akbar. O Allah, make it rise upon us with security and faith, with safety and Islam, and with success in what our Lord loves and is pleased with. Your Lord and my Lord is Allah.'
994.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa apabila Rasulullah ﷺ melihat hilal, beliau berdoa: 'Allahu Akbar. Ya Allah, jadikanlah ia terbit atas kami dengan keamanan dan iman, keselamatan dan Islam, serta taufik kepada apa yang disukai dan diridhai Rabb kami. Rabb-mu dan Rabb-ku adalah Allah.'

995.iwh_en: It was narrated from Talhah (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Prophet ﷺ saw the new crescent, he would say: 'O Allah, make it rise upon us with security and faith, and with safety and Islam. My Lord and your Lord is Allah.'
995.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Talhah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa apabila Nabi ﷺ melihat hilal, beliau berdoa: 'Ya Allah, jadikanlah ia terbit atas kami dengan keamanan dan iman, serta keselamatan dan Islam. Rabb-ku dan Rabb-mu adalah Allah.'

996.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not precede Ramadan by fasting one or two days, unless a man has a habit of fasting, in which case he may continue his fast.'
996.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian mendahului Ramadan dengan berpuasa satu atau dua hari, kecuali seseorang yang memiliki kebiasaan berpuasa, maka ia boleh meneruskan puasanya.'

997.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The month is twenty-nine days. Do not fast until you see it, and do not break your fast until you see it. If it is obscured from you, then calculate it.'
997.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bulan itu dua puluh sembilan hari. Janganlah berpuasa hingga melihatnya, dan janganlah berbuka hingga melihatnya. Jika terhalang dari kalian, maka hitunglah.'

998.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The people were looking for the crescent, and I informed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that I had seen it, so he fasted and commanded the people to fast.'
998.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Orang-orang sedang mengamati hilal, lalu aku memberitahu Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa aku telah melihatnya, maka beliau berpuasa dan memerintahkan orang-orang untuk berpuasa.'

999.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that a Bedouin came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'I have seen the crescent.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do you testify that there is no god but Allah and that I am the Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Yes.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'O Bilal, announce to the people that they should fast tomorrow.'
999.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang Badui datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Aku telah melihat hilal.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah kamu bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah dan bahwa aku adalah utusan Allah?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Bilal, umumkan kepada orang-orang agar mereka berpuasa besok.'

1000.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Bara (may Allah be pleased with him) that the companions of the Prophet ﷺ, when a man was fasting and the time of breaking fast came but he fell asleep before breaking his fast, he would not eat that night nor the following day until evening. Then this verse was revealed: 'Permitted to you on the night of fasting is approach to your wives...' (Quran 2:187), and they rejoiced greatly and ate and drank until the white thread became distinct from the black thread.
1000.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Bara (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para sahabat Nabi ﷺ, apabila seseorang sedang berpuasa dan waktu berbuka tiba namun ia tertidur sebelum berbuka, ia tidak makan malam itu maupun keesokan harinya hingga malam. Kemudian turunlah ayat: 'Dihalalkan bagi kamu pada malam hari puasa bercampur dengan istri-istri kamu...' (QS 2:187), maka mereka sangat gembira dan makan serta minum hingga benang putih tampak jelas dari benang hitam.'

1001.iwh_en: It was narrated from Adi ibn Hatim (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I have placed a white thread and a black thread under my pillow, but I cannot distinguish anything.' He ﷺ said: 'Indeed your pillow is very wide! That refers to the whiteness of the day from the blackness of the night, as Allah says: "Eat and drink until the white thread becomes distinct from the black thread at dawn..." (Quran 2:187).'
1001.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Adi ibn Hatim (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku telah meletakkan benang putih dan benang hitam di bawah bantalku, tetapi aku tidak bisa membedakan sesuatu pun.' Beliau ﷺ bersabda: 'Sungguh bantalmu sangat lebar! Yang dimaksud itu adalah putihnya siang dari hitamnya malam, sebagaimana firman Allah: "Makan dan minumlah hingga benang putih tampak jelas dari benang hitam di waktu fajar..." (QS 2:187).'

1002.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We ate the pre-dawn meal (suhur) with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then he rose for the prayer.' He was asked: 'How long was it between the adhan and the suhur?' He said: 'About the duration of reciting fifty verses.'
1002.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami makan sahur bersama Rasulullah ﷺ, kemudian beliau bangkit untuk shalat.' Ditanyakan: 'Berapa lama antara adzan dan sahur?' Ia berkata: 'Kira-kira selama membaca lima puluh ayat.'

1003.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Eat the pre-dawn meal (suhur), for indeed there is blessing in the suhur.'
1003.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Makanlah sahur, karena sesungguhnya dalam sahur terdapat keberkahan.'

1004.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amr ibn al-As (may Allah be pleased with him) that he would order that food be prepared for his pre-dawn meal but he would eat very little of it. When asked about this, he said: 'I do not order it for you because I desire it, but I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "The distinction between our fasting and the fasting of the People of the Book is the eating of the pre-dawn meal."'
1004.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Amr ibn al-As (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia memerintahkan agar makanan disiapkan untuk sahurnya namun ia hanya makan sedikit. Ketika ditanya, ia berkata: 'Aku tidak memerintahkan itu karena aku menginginkannya, tetapi aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Pembeda antara puasa kita dan puasa Ahli Kitab adalah makan sahur."'

1005.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hafsah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever does not intend the fast before dawn, there is no fast for him.' Abdullah said: 'In the case of an obligatory fast, I hold to this opinion.'
1005.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hafsah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang tidak berniat puasa sebelum fajar, maka tidak ada puasa baginya.' Abdullah berkata: 'Dalam hal puasa wajib, aku berpendapat demikian.'

1006.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sad (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The people will continue to be in good as long as they hasten to break their fast.'
1006.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sad (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Manusia akan senantiasa berada dalam kebaikan selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa.'

1007.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the night comes, the day retreats, and the sun sets, the fasting person has broken his fast.'
1007.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila malam datang, siang pergi, dan matahari terbenam, maka orang yang berpuasa telah berbuka.'

1008.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salman ibn Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When one of you breaks his fast, let him break it with dates. If he cannot find any, then let him break it with water, for indeed water is purifying.'
1008.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salman ibn Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian berbuka, hendaklah ia berbuka dengan kurma. Jika tidak mendapatkan kurma, hendaklah berbuka dengan air, karena sesungguhnya air itu menyucikan.'

1009.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'Whoever provides food for a fasting person to break his fast, he will be recorded a reward equal to that person's reward, without diminishing anything from the fasting person's reward.'
1009.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Barangsiapa memberi makan orang yang berpuasa untuk berbuka, maka dicatat baginya pahala seperti pahala orang yang berpuasa tersebut, tanpa mengurangi pahala orang yang berpuasa itu sedikit pun.'

1010.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said twice: 'Beware of al-wisal (continuous fasting without breaking).' They said: 'But you yourself practice wisal?' He said: 'I am not like any of you; I spend the night while my Lord feeds me and gives me drink.'
1010.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda dua kali: 'Jauhilah wisal (puasa bersambung tanpa berbuka).' Mereka bertanya: 'Bukankah engkau sendiri melakukan wisal?' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku tidak seperti salah seorang dari kalian; aku bermalam sementara Tuhanku memberiku makan dan minum.'

1011.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not practice continuous fasting (wisal).' It was said: 'But you do it yourself.' He said: 'I am not like any of you; I am given food and drink.'
1011.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian melakukan wisal (puasa bersambung).' Dikatakan: 'Tetapi engkau sendiri melakukannya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku tidak seperti salah seorang dari kalian; aku diberi makan dan minum.'

1012.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Do not practice continuous fasting (wisal); whoever among you wishes to do so, let him continue only until the pre-dawn meal.' They said: 'But you yourself practice wisal, O Messenger of Allah.' He said: 'I spend the night while there is one who feeds me and gives me drink.'
1012.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian melakukan wisal; siapa di antara kalian yang ingin melakukannya, hendaklah ia lanjutkan hanya hingga waktu sahur.' Mereka berkata: 'Tetapi engkau sendiri melakukan wisal, wahai Rasulullah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku bermalam sementara ada yang memberiku makan dan minum.'

1013.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade al-wisal (continuous fasting). Some men from the Muslims said: 'But you yourself practice wisal.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I am not like any of you; I spend the night while my Lord feeds me and gives me drink.' When they refused to stop practicing wisal, he led them in wisal for one day, then another day. Then they saw the crescent and he said: 'Had it been delayed, I would have increased you,' as if reprimanding them for their refusal to stop.
1013.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang wisal (puasa bersambung). Beberapa orang dari kaum muslimin berkata: 'Tetapi engkau sendiri melakukan wisal.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku tidak seperti salah seorang dari kalian; aku bermalam sementara Tuhanku memberiku makan dan minum.' Ketika mereka menolak untuk berhenti melakukan wisal, beliau melakukan wisal bersama mereka selama satu hari, lalu satu hari lagi. Kemudian mereka melihat hilal dan beliau bersabda: 'Seandainya hilal terlambat, niscaya aku akan menambahkan kalian,' seolah-olah beliau memberi pelajaran kepada mereka karena menolak berhenti.'

1014.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Hamzah ibn Amr al-Aslami asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, saying: 'O Messenger of Allah, I intend to travel. What do you command me?' He said: 'If you wish, fast; and if you wish, break your fast.'
1014.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Hamzah ibn Amr al-Aslami bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, katanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku hendak bepergian. Apa yang engkau perintahkan kepadaku?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika kamu mau, berpuasalah; dan jika kamu mau, berbukalah.'

1015.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went out in the year of the conquest, and he fasted and the people fasted, until he reached al-Kadid. Then he broke his fast, and the people broke their fast. They would follow the most recent of the Prophet's ﷺ actions.
1015.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ keluar pada tahun penaklukan, dan beliau berpuasa serta orang-orang pun berpuasa, hingga sampai di al-Kadid. Kemudian beliau berbuka, dan orang-orang pun berbuka. Mereka selalu mengikuti tindakan Rasulullah ﷺ yang paling baru.'

1016.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was on a journey and saw a crowd around a man who had been shaded. He asked: 'What is this?' They said: 'He is a man who is fasting.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'It is not righteousness to fast while traveling.'
1016.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ sedang dalam perjalanan dan melihat kerumunan di sekitar seorang pria yang dinaungi. Beliau bertanya: 'Apa ini?' Mereka berkata: 'Ia adalah orang yang sedang berpuasa.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Bukanlah suatu kebaikan berpuasa dalam perjalanan.'

1017.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kab ibn Asim al-Ashari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'It is not righteousness to fast while traveling.'
1017.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Kab ibn Asim al-Ashari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bukanlah suatu kebaikan berpuasa dalam perjalanan.'

1018.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kab ibn Asim al-Ashari (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'It is not righteousness to fast while traveling.'
1018.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Kab ibn Asim al-Ashari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Bukanlah suatu kebaikan berpuasa dalam perjalanan.'

1019.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Umayyah al-Damri (may Allah be pleased with him) that he came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ after a journey, and the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Come, let me tell you about the traveler. Allah has removed from him the obligation of fasting and half the prayer.' Abu Muhammad said: 'He may fast if he wishes, and break his fast if he wishes.'
1019.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Umayyah al-Damri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ setelah melakukan perjalanan, dan Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Marilah, biar aku beritahu kamu tentang musafir. Allah telah menghapus darinya kewajiban puasa dan setengah shalat.' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Ia boleh berpuasa jika mau, dan boleh berbuka jika mau.'

1020.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Basrah al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said during a journey in Ramadan: 'Have you turned away from the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?' meaning that he broke his fast as soon as he set out, even while the houses were still visible.
1020.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Basrah al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata ketika dalam perjalanan di bulan Ramadan: 'Apakah kamu berpaling dari Sunnah Rasulullah ﷺ?' maksudnya ia berbuka puasa segera setelah berangkat, bahkan ketika rumah-rumah masih terlihat.'

1021.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever breaks his fast for one day of Ramadan without a valid dispensation or illness, it cannot be compensated by fasting the rest of time, even if he were to fast for all of time.'
1021.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berbuka pada satu hari dari bulan Ramadan tanpa uzur dan tanpa sakit, maka puasa sepanjang masa tidak dapat menggantikannya, meskipun ia berpuasa sepanjang masa.'

1022.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'Whoever breaks his fast for one day of Ramadan without a dispensation that Allah has granted him, fasting for all of time will not compensate for it.'
1022.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berbuka pada satu hari dari Ramadan tanpa uzur yang Allah berikan kepadanya, puasa sepanjang masa tidak dapat menggantikannya.'

1023.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'I am ruined!' He said: 'What has ruined you?' He said: 'I had intercourse with my wife during Ramadan.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Free a slave.' He said: 'I cannot.' He said: 'Then fast two consecutive months.' He said: 'I cannot.' He said: 'Then feed sixty poor persons.' He said: 'I cannot find anything.' Then a basket of dates was brought to the Prophet ﷺ, and he said: 'Where is the questioner? Give this in charity.' The man said: 'To someone poorer than my family, O Messenger of Allah? By Allah, there is no household between the two lava fields poorer than us!' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ smiled until his molars showed and said: 'Then it is for you.'
1023.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: 'Aku celaka!' Beliau bertanya: 'Apa yang mencelakaimu?' Ia berkata: 'Aku berjimak dengan istriku di bulan Ramadan.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Bebaskan seorang budak.' Ia berkata: 'Aku tidak mampu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Berpuasalah dua bulan berturut-turut.' Ia berkata: 'Aku tidak sanggup.' Beliau bersabda: 'Beri makan enam puluh orang miskin.' Ia berkata: 'Aku tidak mendapatkan sesuatu pun.' Kemudian dibawakan sekeranjang kurma kepada Nabi ﷺ, dan beliau bersabda: 'Di mana orang yang bertanya tadi? Sedekahkan ini.' Pria itu berkata: 'Kepada yang lebih miskin dari keluargaku, wahai Rasulullah? Demi Allah, tidak ada satu rumah tangga pun di antara kedua tanah berbatu hitam yang lebih miskin dari kami!' Rasulullah ﷺ pun tersenyum hingga tampak gigi gerahamnya dan bersabda: 'Kalau begitu, itu untukmu.'

1024.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man came to the Prophet ﷺ saying he had been burned, and when asked what happened, said he had been intimate with his wife during Ramadan. The Prophet ﷺ was brought a basket called al-araq containing dates and said: 'Where is the burned one?' When the man stood up, he said: 'Give this in charity.'
1024.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria datang kepada Nabi ﷺ mengatakan ia telah terbakar (celaka), dan ketika ditanya tentang apa yang terjadi, ia mengatakan telah berjimak dengan istrinya di bulan Ramadan. Nabi ﷺ dibawakan sekeranjang yang disebut al-araq berisi kurma dan bersabda: 'Di mana orang yang terbakar itu?' Ketika pria itu berdiri, beliau bersabda: 'Sedekahkan ini.'

1025.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said to a woman: 'Do not fast except with his (her husband's) permission.'
1025.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda kepada seorang wanita: 'Janganlah kamu berpuasa kecuali dengan izinnya (suaminya).'

1026.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'A woman must not fast a voluntary day outside of Ramadan while her husband is present, except with his permission.'
1026.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Seorang wanita tidak boleh berpuasa satu hari sunnah di luar Ramadan sementara suaminya ada, kecuali dengan izinnya.'

1027.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'A woman must not fast a day while her husband is present, except with his permission.' He added: 'In the case of vowed fasts, she fulfills them.'
1027.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Seorang wanita tidak boleh berpuasa satu hari sementara suaminya ada, kecuali dengan izinnya.' Ia menambahkan: 'Dalam hal puasa nadzar, ia memenuhinya.'

1028.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss while he was fasting. Urwah remarked: 'She does not invite to anything good (by reporting this).'
1028.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium (istrinya) sementara beliau sedang berpuasa. Urwah berkomentar: 'Ia tidak mengajak kepada kebaikan apa pun (dengan menyampaikan hal ini).'

1029.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to kiss her while he was fasting.
1029.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa menciumnya sementara beliau sedang berpuasa.'

1030.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was overcome by desire and kissed while fasting, so I came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: "I have done something great today — I kissed while fasting." He said: "What would you say if you rinsed your mouth with water?" I said: "That would not cause any harm." He said: "Then why the worry?"'
1030.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku dilanda keinginan dan mencium sementara aku berpuasa, lalu aku datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: "Aku telah melakukan hal besar hari ini — aku mencium sementara aku berpuasa." Beliau bersabda: "Bagaimana pendapatmu jika kamu berkumur dengan air?" Aku berkata: "Itu tidak akan membahayakan." Beliau bersabda: "Lalu mengapa khawatir?"'

1031.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah and Aisha (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Prophet ﷺ used to wake up in a state of major impurity (junub) from his family, and then fast.
1031.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah dan Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa bangun dalam keadaan junub (hadats besar) setelah bersama istrinya, kemudian berpuasa.'

1032.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'Whoever forgets while fasting and eats or drinks, let him complete his fast, for it is Allah who fed him and gave him drink.'
1032.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Barangsiapa lupa sementara ia berpuasa lalu makan atau minum, hendaklah ia menyempurnakan puasanya, karena sesungguhnya Allah-lah yang memberinya makan dan minum.'

1033.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If one of you eats or drinks out of forgetfulness while fasting, then remembers, let him complete his fast, for it is Allah who fed him and gave him drink.' Abu Muhammad said: 'The people of the Hijaz say he must make it up, but I say he does not need to make it up.'
1033.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian makan atau minum karena lupa sementara ia berpuasa, kemudian teringat, hendaklah ia menyempurnakan puasanya, karena sesungguhnya Allah-lah yang memberinya makan dan minum.' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Ahli Hijaz berpendapat ia harus mengqadhanya, namun aku berpendapat ia tidak perlu mengqadhanya.'

1034.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ vomited and broke his fast. He said: 'Then I met Thawban in the mosque of Damascus and mentioned this to him, and he said: "He is right, I poured water for his ablution."' Abdullah said: 'This applies when one intentionally vomits.'
1034.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ muntah lalu berbuka. Ia berkata: 'Kemudian aku bertemu Thawban di masjid Damaskus dan menyebutkan hal ini kepadanya, dan ia berkata: "Ia benar, aku yang menuangkan air untuk wudhunya."' Abdullah berkata: 'Ini berlaku ketika seseorang sengaja muntah.'

1035.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If a fasting person is overcome by vomiting without intending it, there is no make-up required of him. But if he intentionally vomits, then he must make it up.'
1035.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika orang yang berpuasa didahului oleh muntah tanpa ia menginginkannya, maka tidak ada qadha baginya. Tetapi jika ia sengaja muntah, maka ia harus mengqadhanya.'

1036.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shaddad ibn Aws (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was walking with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on the eighteenth of Ramadan, and he saw a man having cupping done, so the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The one who cups and the one who is cupped have broken their fast."'
1036.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shaddad ibn Aws (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku berjalan bersama Rasulullah ﷺ pada hari kedelapan belas Ramadan, dan beliau melihat seorang pria yang sedang dibekam, maka Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Orang yang membekam dan yang dibekam telah membatalkan puasanya."'

1037.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'While the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was walking at al-Baqi, he saw a man having cupping done, and said: "The one who cups and the one who is cupped have broken their fast."' Abu Muhammad said: 'I avoid cupping while fasting in Ramadan.'
1037.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ berjalan di al-Baqi, beliau melihat seorang pria yang sedang dibekam, dan bersabda: "Orang yang membekam dan yang dibekam telah membatalkan puasanya."' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Aku menghindari bekam saat berpuasa di bulan Ramadan.'

1038.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ubaidah ibn al-Jarrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Fasting is a shield as long as one does not tear it."' Abu Muhammad said: 'Meaning: by backbiting.'
1038.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ubaidah ibn al-Jarrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Puasa adalah perisai selama seseorang tidak merusaknya."' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Maksudnya: dengan ghibah (bergunjing).'

1039.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said to a man whose head he had touched: 'Do not apply kohl during the day while you are fasting; apply it at night, with ithmid (antimony), for it brightens the eyesight and promotes hair growth.' Abu Muhammad said: 'I see no harm in using kohl.'
1039.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda kepada seorang pria yang kepalanya beliau usap: 'Janganlah kamu memakai celak di siang hari sementara kamu berpuasa; pakailah di malam hari, dengan ithmid (antimon), karena ia menjernihkan penglihatan dan menumbuhkan rambut.' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Aku tidak melihat masalah dalam menggunakan celak.'

1040.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salamah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When this verse was revealed: "And upon those who are able to fast, a ransom of feeding a poor person" (Quran 2:184), whoever wanted to break his fast and pay the ransom would do so, until the verse that came after it abrogated it.'
1040.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika ayat ini turun: "Dan bagi orang yang berat menjalankannya, membayar fidyah, yaitu memberi makan seorang miskin" (QS 2:184), siapa yang ingin berbuka dan membayar fidyah boleh melakukannya, hingga ayat berikutnya turun dan menasakhnya.'

1041.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her while she was fasting, and a vessel was brought and he drank from it, then passed it to her and she drank. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If it was a make-up fast for Ramadan, then fast another day. If it was a voluntary fast, then if you wish, make it up, and if you wish, do not.'
1041.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuinya sementara ia sedang berpuasa, lalu dibawakan sebuah bejana dan beliau minum darinya, kemudian memberikannya kepada Umm Hani dan ia pun minum. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika itu adalah puasa qadha Ramadan, maka berpuasalah satu hari lagi. Jika itu adalah puasa sunnah, maka jika kamu mau, qadhailah; dan jika kamu mau, jangan.'

1042.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) that on the day of the conquest of Makkah, Fatimah sat to the left of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and Umm Hani to his right. A vessel of drink was brought and after the Prophet ﷺ drank from it, he passed it to Umm Hani. She drank from it and then said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I have broken my fast, and I was fasting.' He asked: 'Were you making up for something?' She said: 'No.' He said: 'Then it does no harm to you if it was a voluntary fast.' Abu Muhammad said: 'I agree with this.'
1042.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada hari penaklukan Mekah, Fatimah duduk di sebelah kiri Rasulullah ﷺ dan Umm Hani di sebelah kanannya. Dibawakan sebuah bejana minuman, dan setelah Nabi ﷺ minum darinya, beliau memberikannya kepada Umm Hani. Ia minum darinya lalu berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku telah berbuka, padahal aku sedang berpuasa.' Beliau bertanya: 'Apakah kamu sedang mengqadha sesuatu?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Maka itu tidak membahayakanmu jika itu adalah puasa sunnah.' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Aku sependapat dengan ini.'

1043.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you is invited to food while fasting, let him say: "I am fasting."'
1043.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian diundang makan sementara ia sedang berpuasa, hendaklah ia berkata: "Aku sedang berpuasa."'

1044.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Umarah bint Kab (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her and she offered him food. He said to her: 'Eat.' She said: 'I am fasting.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'When the fasting person is eating in his presence, the angels send blessings upon him until they finish their meal.'
1044.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Umarah bint Kab (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuinya dan ia menawarkan makanan kepadanya. Beliau berkata: 'Makanlah.' Ia berkata: 'Aku sedang berpuasa.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila seseorang yang berpuasa ada orang yang makan di sisinya, maka para malaikat bershalawat atasnya hingga mereka selesai makan.'

1045.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ fast a complete month except Shaban, for he used to connect it to Ramadan so that they would be two consecutive months. He would fast in the month until we would say: "By Allah, he will never break his fast," and he would break his fast until we would say: "By Allah, he will never fast."'
1045.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berpuasa satu bulan penuh kecuali Sya'ban, karena beliau biasa menyambungnya dengan Ramadan agar keduanya menjadi dua bulan berturut-turut. Beliau berpuasa di bulan itu hingga kami berkata: "Demi Allah, beliau tidak akan berbuka," dan beliau berbuka hingga kami berkata: "Demi Allah, beliau tidak akan berpuasa."'

1046.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the middle of Shaban comes, then restrain yourselves from fasting.'
1046.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila pertengahan Sya'ban tiba, maka tahanlah diri kalian dari berpuasa.'

1047.iwh_en: It was narrated from Imran ibn Husayn (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to a man: 'Did you fast the last days of this month (Shaban)?' He said: 'No.' He said: 'When you break your fast from Ramadan, then fast two days.' Abu Muhammad said: 'Its last days means its end.'
1047.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Imran ibn Husayn (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada seorang pria: 'Apakah kamu berpuasa di hari-hari terakhir bulan ini (Sya'ban)?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Apabila kamu selesai berbuka dari Ramadan, berpuasalah dua hari.' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Hari-hari terakhirnya berarti penghujungnya.'

1048.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that he said: 'The Prophet ﷺ never fasted a full month other than Ramadan. When he fasted, he would fast until the people said: "By Allah, he will never break his fast," and when he broke his fast, he would break it until the people said: "By Allah, he will never fast."'
1048.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ tidak pernah berpuasa satu bulan penuh selain Ramadan. Ketika beliau berpuasa, beliau berpuasa hingga orang-orang berkata: "Demi Allah, beliau tidak akan berbuka," dan ketika beliau berbuka, beliau berbuka hingga orang-orang berkata: "Demi Allah, beliau tidak akan berpuasa."'

1049.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn al-Shakhkhir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'A man who fasted perpetually was mentioned in the presence of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he said: "He neither fasted nor broke his fast."'
1049.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn al-Shakhkhir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang pria yang berpuasa sepanjang waktu disebutkan di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau bersabda: "Ia tidak berpuasa dan tidak berbuka."'

1050.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'My close friend (the Prophet ﷺ) advised me of three things which I will never abandon: "That I sleep only after praying Witr, that I fast three days of every month, and that I not abandon the two rakats of Duha."'
1050.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sahabat dekatku (Nabi ﷺ) mewasiatkan kepadaku tiga hal yang tidak akan aku tinggalkan: "Agar aku tidak tidur kecuali setelah shalat Witir, agar aku berpuasa tiga hari setiap bulan, dan agar aku tidak meninggalkan dua rakaat Dhuha."'

1051.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Muawiyah ibn Qurrah (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'Fasting the bright days (the 13th, 14th, and 15th of each month) is equivalent to fasting throughout the year, along with its breaking.'
1051.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Muawiyah ibn Qurrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Puasa hari-hari putih (tanggal 13, 14, dan 15 setiap bulan) setara dengan puasa sepanjang tahun beserta buka puasanya.'

1052.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that Muhammad ibn Abbad ibn Jafar said: 'I asked Jabir: "Did the Prophet ﷺ forbid fasting on Friday?"' He said: 'Yes, by the Lord of this House.'
1052.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Muhammad ibn Abbad ibn Jafar berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Jabir: "Apakah Nabi ﷺ melarang puasa pada hari Jumat?"' Ia berkata: 'Ya, demi Tuhan Rumah ini (Ka'bah).'

1053.iwh_en: It was narrated from the sister of Abdullah ibn Busr, known as al-Samma (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not fast on Saturday except for what has been made obligatory upon you. If one of you cannot find anything (to break his fast with) except the bark of a tree, then let him chew it.'
1053.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari saudara perempuan Abdullah ibn Busr yang dikenal sebagai al-Samma (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian berpuasa pada hari Sabtu kecuali puasa yang diwajibkan atas kalian. Jika salah seorang dari kalian tidak mendapatkan sesuatu pun (untuk berbuka) kecuali kulit pohon, hendaklah ia mengunyahnya.'

1054.iwh_en: It was narrated from the freed slave of Usamah (may Allah be pleased with him) that Usamah (ibn Zayd) used to fast on Mondays and Thursdays while traveling to his property in Wadi al-Qura. When asked why he fasted on those days despite his old age and weakness, he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to fast on Mondays and Thursdays, and he said: "The deeds of people are presented on Mondays and Thursdays."'
1054.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari mantan budak Usamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Usamah (ibn Zayd) biasa berpuasa pada hari Senin dan Kamis ketika bepergian ke hartanya di Wadi al-Qura. Ketika ditanya mengapa ia berpuasa pada hari-hari itu di tengah usia tuanya, ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berpuasa pada hari Senin dan Kamis, dan beliau bersabda: "Amal-amal manusia ditampakkan pada hari Senin dan Kamis."'

1055.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to fast on Mondays and Thursdays. When asked about it, he said: 'Deeds are presented on Mondays and Thursdays.'
1055.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berpuasa pada hari Senin dan Kamis. Ketika ditanya tentang itu, beliau bersabda: 'Amal-amal ditampakkan pada hari Senin dan Kamis.'

1056.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) in a hadith that was traced to the Prophet ﷺ: 'The most beloved fasting to Allah is the fast of Dawud; he used to fast one day and break his fast the next. And the most beloved prayer to Allah is the prayer of Dawud; he used to pray (one) half of the night, sleep a third, and glorify Allah a sixth.'
1056.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dalam hadits yang disandarkan kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Puasa yang paling dicintai Allah adalah puasa Dawud; ia berpuasa satu hari dan berbuka satu hari. Dan shalat yang paling dicintai Allah adalah shalat Dawud; ia biasa shalat setengah malam, tidur sepertiga, dan bertasbih seperenamnya.'

1057.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'There is no fasting on two days: the day of Eid al-Fitr and the day of Eid al-Adha.'
1057.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Tidak ada puasa pada dua hari: hari Idul Fitri dan hari Idul Adha.'

1058.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'Whoever fasts Ramadan and then follows it with six days of Shawwal, that is equivalent to fasting throughout the year.'
1058.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berpuasa Ramadan kemudian mengikutinya dengan enam hari dari Syawal, maka itulah puasa sepanjang tahun.'

1059.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Fasting a month is equivalent to ten months, and six days after it are equivalent to two months, and that is the completion of a year,' meaning the month of Ramadan and six days after it.
1059.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Puasa satu bulan setara dengan sepuluh bulan, dan enam hari setelahnya setara dengan dua bulan, dan itulah genap satu tahun,' yaitu bulan Ramadan dan enam hari setelahnya.'

1060.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to him and asked about a month he could fast after Ramadan. Ali said: 'No one has asked me about this since I heard a man ask the Prophet ﷺ: "Which month should I fast after Ramadan?" And he commanded him to fast Muharram, saying: "In it is a day on which Allah accepted the repentance of a people, and He accepts repentance on it from others."'
1060.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria datang kepadanya dan bertanya tentang satu bulan yang dapat ia puasakan setelah Ramadan. Ali berkata: 'Tidak ada yang bertanya kepadaku tentang ini sejak aku mendengar seorang pria bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: "Bulan apa yang harus aku puasakan setelah Ramadan?" Dan beliau memerintahkannya untuk berpuasa Muharram, seraya bersabda: "Di dalamnya terdapat hari di mana Allah menerima taubat suatu kaum, dan Dia menerima taubat kaum lainnya pada hari itu."'

1061.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The best fasting after the month of Ramadan is the month of Allah which you call Muharram.'
1061.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Puasa yang paling utama setelah bulan Ramadan adalah bulan Allah yang kalian sebut Muharram.'

1062.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The best fasting after the month of Ramadan is Muharram.'
1062.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Puasa yang paling utama setelah bulan Ramadan adalah Muharram.'

1063.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to Madinah and found the Jews fasting on the day of Ashura. He asked them about it, and they said: "This is the day on which Musa prevailed over Pharaoh." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "You have a greater right to Musa, so fast it."'
1063.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tiba di Madinah dan mendapati orang-orang Yahudi berpuasa pada hari Asyura. Beliau bertanya kepada mereka tentangnya, dan mereka berkata: "Ini adalah hari di mana Musa menang atas Fir'aun." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Kalian lebih berhak atas Musa, maka berpuasalah."'

1064.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to fast the day of Ashura and would command them to fast it.
1064.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berpuasa pada hari Asyura dan memerintahkan mereka untuk berpuasa pada hari itu.'

1065.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salamah ibn al-Akwa (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ sent a man from Aslam on the day of Ashura saying: 'Today is the day of Ashura. Whoever has already eaten or drunk, let him complete the rest of his day. And whoever has not yet eaten or drunk, let him fast it.'
1065.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salamah ibn al-Akwa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengutus seorang pria dari Aslam pada hari Asyura untuk mengumumkan: 'Hari ini adalah hari Asyura. Barangsiapa telah makan atau minum, hendaklah ia menyempurnakan sisa harinya. Dan barangsiapa belum makan atau minum, hendaklah ia berpuasa.'

1066.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This is the day of Ashura, and the Quraysh used to fast it in the pre-Islamic era. Whoever among you wishes to fast it, let him fast it; and whoever wishes to leave it, let him leave it.' Ibn Umar would not fast it unless it coincided with his regular fasting.
1066.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ini adalah hari Asyura, dan kaum Quraisy biasa berpuasa padanya di masa Jahiliyah. Siapa di antara kalian yang ingin berpuasa, hendaklah berpuasa; dan siapa yang ingin meninggalkannya, hendaklah meninggalkannya.' Ibn Umar tidak berpuasa padanya kecuali jika bertepatan dengan puasa rutinnya.'

1067.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The day of Ashura was a day that Quraysh used to fast in the pre-Islamic era. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to Madinah, he fasted it and commanded fasting it. When Ramadan was made obligatory, Ramadan became the obligatory fast, and the day of Ashura was abandoned. Whoever wished fasted it, and whoever wished left it.'
1067.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Hari Asyura adalah hari yang biasa dipuasakan kaum Quraisy di masa Jahiliyah. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ tiba di Madinah, beliau berpuasa padanya dan memerintahkan untuk berpuasa padanya. Ketika Ramadan diwajibkan, Ramadan menjadi puasa wajib, dan hari Asyura ditinggalkan. Siapa yang mau berpuasa boleh berpuasa, dan siapa yang mau meninggalkannya boleh meninggalkannya.'

1068.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uqbah ibn Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The day of Arafah and the days of Tashriq are our Eid, the people of Islam, and they are days of eating and drinking.'
1068.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uqbah ibn Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hari Arafah dan hari-hari Tasyriq adalah hari raya kita, umat Islam, dan itu adalah hari-hari makan dan minum.'

1069.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them both) that he was asked about fasting the day of Arafah. He said: 'I performed Hajj with the Prophet ﷺ and he did not fast it; I performed Hajj with Abu Bakr and he did not fast it; I performed Hajj with Umar and he did not fast it; I performed Hajj with Uthman and he did not fast it; and I do not fast it, nor do I command it, nor do I forbid it.'
1069.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia ditanya tentang puasa hari Arafah. Ia berkata: 'Aku berhaji bersama Nabi ﷺ dan beliau tidak berpuasa padanya; aku berhaji bersama Abu Bakr dan ia tidak berpuasa padanya; aku berhaji bersama Umar dan ia tidak berpuasa padanya; aku berhaji bersama Utsman dan ia tidak berpuasa padanya; dan aku tidak berpuasa padanya, tidak memerintahkannya, dan tidak melarangnya.'

1070.iwh_en: It was narrated from Bishr ibn Suhaym (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded him or commanded a man to call out during the days of Tashriq: 'Only a believer will enter Paradise, and these are days of eating and drinking.'
1070.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Bishr ibn Suhaym (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya atau memerintahkan seorang pria untuk mengumumkan pada hari-hari Tasyriq: 'Hanya orang beriman yang akan masuk surga, dan ini adalah hari-hari makan dan minum.'

1071.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amr ibn al-As (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to his son Abdullah when offered food on the day after Eid al-Adha: 'Break your fast, for these are the days in which the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to command us to break our fast and forbid us from fasting.' So Abdullah broke his fast and ate, and the narrator ate with him.
1071.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Amr ibn al-As (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada putranya Abdullah ketika makanan dihidangkan pada hari setelah Idul Adha: 'Berbukalah, karena ini adalah hari-hari yang Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memerintahkan kita untuk berbuka dan melarang kita dari berpuasa.' Maka Abdullah berbuka dan makan, dan perawi pun makan bersamanya.'

1072.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that a woman vowed to fast but then died. Her brother came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and asked him about it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'If she had a debt, would you pay it off?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Then fulfill what is owed to Allah, for Allah has greater right to fulfillment.' He said: 'So he fasted on her behalf.'
1072.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang wanita bernadzar untuk berpuasa tetapi kemudian meninggal. Saudaranya datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan menanyakan hal itu. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Jika ia memiliki utang, apakah kamu akan melunasinya?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Maka penuhilah apa yang terutang kepada Allah, karena Allah lebih berhak untuk dipenuhi.' Ia berkata: 'Maka ia berpuasa atas nama saudaranya.'

1073.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The breath from the mouth of the fasting person is more pleasing to Allah than the fragrance of musk. And the fasting person has two joys: a joy at the time of breaking his fast, and a joy on the Day of Resurrection.'
1073.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bau mulut orang yang berpuasa lebih harum di sisi Allah daripada wangi minyak kesturi. Dan orang yang berpuasa memiliki dua kegembiraan: kegembiraan saat berbuka puasa, dan kegembiraan pada Hari Kiamat.'

1074.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah Most High says: "Every deed of the son of Adam is for him: a good deed is rewarded from ten to seven hundred times over, except fasting — it is for Me and I will reward it. For he abandons his food and his desire for My sake, and abandons his drink and his desire for My sake. So it is for Me and I will reward it."'
1074.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Ta'ala berfirman: "Setiap amal anak Adam adalah untuknya: kebaikan dibalas dari sepuluh hingga tujuh ratus kali lipat, kecuali puasa — ia untuk-Ku dan Aku yang akan membalasnya. Karena ia meninggalkan makanan dan syahwatnya demi Aku, dan meninggalkan minuman dan syahwatnya demi Aku. Maka ia untuk-Ku dan Aku yang akan membalasnya."'

1075.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Fasting is a shield.'
1075.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Puasa adalah perisai.'

1076.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Prophet ﷺ broke his fast with people, he would say: 'May the fasting persons break their fast with you, may the righteous eat your food, and may the angels descend upon you.'
1076.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa apabila Nabi ﷺ berbuka puasa bersama orang-orang, beliau berdoa: 'Semoga orang-orang yang berpuasa berbuka di tempat kalian, semoga orang-orang yang baik memakan makanan kalian, dan semoga para malaikat turun kepada kalian.'

1077.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'There are no deeds more virtuous than deeds done in the ten days of Dhul Hijjah.' It was said: 'Not even jihad in the way of Allah?' He said: 'Not even jihad in the way of Allah, except for a man who goes out with himself and his wealth and does not return with anything.'
1077.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Tidak ada amal yang lebih utama dari amal yang dilakukan pada sepuluh hari Dzul Hijjah.' Dikatakan: 'Bahkan tidak lebih dari jihad di jalan Allah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Bahkan tidak lebih dari jihad di jalan Allah, kecuali seseorang yang keluar dengan dirinya dan hartanya lalu tidak kembali dengan sesuatu pun.'

1078.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) from the Prophet ﷺ who said: 'There is no deed purer before Allah and greater in reward than a good deed performed during the ten days of Eid al-Adha.' It was said: 'Not even jihad in the way of Allah?' He said: 'Not even jihad in the way of Allah, except for a man who goes out with himself and his wealth and returns with nothing.' It was noted that Said ibn Jubayr would exert himself greatly in worship when the ten days came.
1078.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) dari Nabi ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Tidak ada amal yang lebih murni di sisi Allah dan lebih besar pahalanya dari kebaikan yang dikerjakan pada sepuluh hari Idul Adha.' Dikatakan: 'Bahkan tidak lebih dari jihad di jalan Allah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Bahkan tidak lebih dari jihad di jalan Allah, kecuali seseorang yang keluar dengan dirinya dan hartanya lalu tidak kembali dengan sesuatu pun.' Disebutkan bahwa Said ibn Jubayr biasa bersungguh-sungguh dalam beribadah ketika sepuluh hari itu tiba.'

1079.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When Ramadan comes, the gates of heaven are opened, the gates of the Hellfire are closed, and the devils are chained.'
1079.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila Ramadan tiba, pintu-pintu langit dibuka, pintu-pintu neraka ditutup, dan setan-setan dibelenggu.'

1080.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever stands in prayer during Ramadan out of faith and seeking reward, his previous sins will be forgiven. And whoever stands in prayer on the Night of Decree, his previous sins will be forgiven.'
1080.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mendirikan shalat malam di bulan Ramadan dengan iman dan mengharap pahala, dosanya yang telah lalu akan diampuni. Dan barangsiapa mendirikan shalat malam pada Lailatul Qadar, dosanya yang telah lalu akan diampuni.'

1081.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dhar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We fasted Ramadan with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He did not lead us in prayer at any part of the month until seven nights remained, when he led us in prayer until a third of the night had passed. When six nights remained, he did not lead us. When five nights remained, he led us until half of the night was gone. We said: "O Messenger of Allah, if only you would add the rest of this night." He said: "When a man prays with the imam until he finishes, it is counted for him as the prayer of the whole night." On the third night he gathered his family, his wives, and the people, and led us in prayer until we feared we would miss the Falah." We asked: "What is the Falah?" He said: "The suhur (pre-dawn meal)." Then he did not lead us in prayer for the rest of the month.'
1081.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dhar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami berpuasa Ramadan bersama Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau tidak memimpin kami shalat sedikit pun di bulan itu hingga tersisa tujuh malam, lalu beliau memimpin kami shalat hingga sepertiga malam berlalu. Ketika tersisa enam malam, beliau tidak memimpin kami. Ketika tersisa lima malam, beliau memimpin kami hingga setengah malam terakhir berlalu. Kami berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, seandainya engkau menambahkan sisa malam ini." Beliau bersabda: "Apabila seseorang shalat bersama imam hingga selesai, dihitung baginya shalat semalam penuh." Pada malam ketiga, beliau mengumpulkan keluarganya, istri-istrinya, dan orang-orang, lalu memimpin kami shalat hingga kami khawatir akan ketinggalan Falah." Kami bertanya: "Apa Falah itu?" Beliau bersabda: "Sahur." Kemudian beliau tidak memimpin kami shalat lagi untuk sisa bulan itu.'

1082.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform itikaf (seclusion in the mosque) during the last ten days. In the year he passed away, he performed itikaf for twenty days.
1082.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa beri'tikaf pada sepuluh hari terakhir. Pada tahun beliau wafat, beliau beri'tikaf selama dua puluh hari.'

1083.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safiyyah bint Huyay (may Allah be pleased with her) that she came to visit the Prophet ﷺ during his itikaf in the mosque in the last ten days of Ramadan, and she spoke with him for a while then stood up to leave.
1083.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Safiyyah bint Huyay (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia datang mengunjungi Nabi ﷺ selama i'tikaf beliau di masjid pada sepuluh hari terakhir Ramadan, dan ia berbincang-bincang dengan beliau sejenak kemudian berdiri untuk pergi.'

1084.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubadah ibn al-Samit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out intending to inform them about the Night of Decree, but two Muslim men were quarreling. He said: 'I came out to tell you about the Night of Decree, but there was a dispute between so-and-so and so-and-so, and it was lifted. Perhaps that is better. Seek it in the last ten nights: on the fifth, the seventh, and the ninth.'
1084.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubadah ibn al-Samit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ keluar dengan maksud memberitahu mereka tentang Lailatul Qadar, tetapi dua orang Muslim sedang bertengkar. Beliau bersabda: 'Aku keluar untuk memberitahu kalian tentang Lailatul Qadar, tetapi ada perselisihan antara si fulan dan si fulan, sehingga ia diangkat. Mungkin itu lebih baik. Carilah ia pada sepuluh malam terakhir: pada malam kelima, ketujuh, dan kesembilan.'

1085.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was shown the Night of Decree, then one of my family woke me and I forgot it. So seek it in the last remaining nights.'
1085.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diperlihatkan Lailatul Qadar, kemudian salah seorang keluargaku membangunkanku dan aku pun lupa. Maka carilah ia pada malam-malam terakhir yang tersisa.'

1086.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Seek the Night of Decree in the last seven nights.'
1086.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Carilah Lailatul Qadar pada tujuh malam terakhir.'
